$comment: Machine-consumed merge bar. Every field is dereferenced by scripts/gate_runner.py or validated by scripts/check.py (section 14) — doctrine lives in docs/HOW-IT-WORKS.md, not here. Two invariants are encoded as ABSENCES: `validity` has no 'none' value (a bar always demands a human attestation — the two-conjunct invariant), and no field can express autonomous crossing of shared history. `args` placeholders are a closed set: {repo} {base} {head} {spec_dir} {plan_dir} {declared} {head_tree}; a gate whose args contain {spec_dir} runs once per resolved spec dir (docs/plans/*/specs/*) and one containing {plan_dir} runs once per resolved plan dir (docs/plans/* holding a plan.json), and {head_tree} resolves to the repo tree as committed at head (materialized by the runner so the verdict cannot depend on the working tree). Per-class `advisory_gates` run and report but never affect the verdict (promote one to required_integrity_gates in a local override to make it gate). Optional `class_rules` classifies a PR FROM THE COMMITTED DIFF when --change-class is omitted: each rule's path globs are matched against `git diff --name-only base head`, first match wins, else the mandatory `fallback` (both rule `class` and `fallback` must name a defined change class; explicit --change-class always wins). Here `.github/**` (which covers `.github/merge-bar/**`) and `.merge-bar/**` escalate to the two-human `sensitive` bar — so a PR that declares its own new dependency in `.github/merge-bar/declared-deps.txt`, or accepts its own finding in `.merge-bar/dispositions.json` (the finding-disposition ledger the `secrets-guard`/`sca-guard` advisory gates read AS COMMITTED at head, validated by `disposition-lint`), is allowed same-PR ONLY under two-human review, encoded in policy, not memory. Optional `spec_lint_scope` ('all' default — fail-closed; or 'changed-plans' — the {spec_dir}/{plan_dir} fan-out is filtered to dirs the diff touches, and an empty fan-out becomes a vacuous PASS advisory) makes the bar usable before the first plan and stops a legacy/broken spec elsewhere from failing every PR. Scripts are plugin-relative fork-manifest CANONICALS — never hand-edit a forked copy. The policy ships inside the plugin because ce-auto-build's presence rule (check.py §14) keys on it and future ce-init scaffolding copies it — it is not a dead file for plugin users whose skills never read it.

spec-lint.proves: spec traceability and architecture provenance hold: every task verifies a real test case, every AC is proven, assigned TZ-NNN threats carry [SECURITY] coverage, and tasks/Markdown bind the current typed architecture context (H1-H7)

test-guard.proves: the test suite was not weakened across the change: no test file deleted or emptied, no net assertions removed, no skips or trivially-true assertions added (integrity, never sufficiency)

dep-guard.proves: no undeclared new direct dependency entered a manifest, with typosquat advisory (offline half only; an empty declared set fails every new dep — fail-safe)

sca-guard.proves: no exactly-pinned dependency is OSV-advisory-listed, judged against manifests AS COMMITTED at head (advisory: needs network; exit 2 degradation reports, never passes silently)

implement-scope.proves: no file was touched outside the union of every spec's tasks[].files (the Scope Lock's file boundary), judged AS COMMITTED at head (advisory: fail-closed only where a spec declares files, legacy file-less specs degrade to a warning; an adopter promotes it to required once the repo fully adopts tasks[].files)

review-gate.proves: current review evidence for the exact evaluated head has no confirmed-High correctness/security finding: the gate re-derives blocking_high from structured findings and verifies the plan/spec/architecture/repository-state binding (advisory: missing, stale, malformed, or blocked review evidence reports but never blocks until promoted to required)

plan-lint.proves: plan referential integrity and DAG soundness hold for this plan dir (H1-H8: file refs resolve, ids unique, ship-order valid, dependencies point earlier and are acyclic, bridges retire into valid future features, cross-feature re-projections present) (advisory: structure, never soundness)

secrets-guard.proves: no credential signature or high-entropy secret entered a line the change ADDS between base and head, minus any actively-dispositioned finding in .merge-bar/dispositions.json (advisory: diff-scoped so pre-existing secrets never red every PR; values redacted, never emitted; a whole-tree/historical sweep is the separate gitleaks adapter)

disposition-lint.proves: the finding-disposition ledger .merge-bar/dispositions.json is well-formed AS COMMITTED at head: every accepted-risk entry has a unique id, a known gate, a valid match, a reason, a by-human stamp, and an unexpired date (advisory: an absent ledger passes; an expired disposition is flagged here and re-alarms through its consuming gate)
